title: Topological stable rank of $\mathcal{E}'(\mathbb{R})$
abstract: The set $\mathcal{E}'(\mathbb{R})$ of all compactly distributions, with the operations of addition, convolution, multiplication by complex scalars, and with the strong dual topology is a topological algebra. In this article, it is shown that the topological stable rank of $\mathcal{E}'(\mathbb{R})$ is 2.
comment: 12 pages. In the new version, the typos which were discovered in the first version have been corrected, and an alternative proof of Prop.4.1 (suggested by Peter Wagner) has been added
